tools.videoToGifDesc: Convert video to GIF and split into five panels for Steam showcase display

videoToGif.keepAspectDesc: When checked, original video aspect ratio is preserved and width/height inputs are disabled
videoToGif.autoFill: Auto-fill remaining area when video and output aspect ratios differ
videoToGif.tipText: Enable "Keep aspect ratio" to prevent GIF distortion. After setting parameters, continue to upload your video.
videoToGif.formatsSupport: Supports MP4, AVI, MOV, WebM, and most other formats
videoToGif.fiveSplitDesc: Split the video into five equal-width GIF files with 4px black gaps for the best Steam profile display.
videoToGif.sharedArrayBufferError: SharedArrayBuffer is not supported. Please use HTTPS or localhost.
